title: Red Hat Security Advisory: yggdrasil-worker-package-manager security update
overview:
An update for yggdrasil-worker-package-manager is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: yggdrasil-worker-package-manager security update

An update for yggdrasil-worker-package-manager is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for yggdrasil-worker-package-manager is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-0.2.3-4.el10_0.src.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-0.2.3-4.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debuginfo-0.2.3-4.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debugsource-0.2.3-4.el10_0.x86_64.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-0.2.3-4.el10_0.s390x.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debuginfo-0.2.3-4.el10_0.s390x.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debugsource-0.2.3-4.el10_0.s390x.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-0.2.3-4.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debuginfo-0.2.3-4.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debugsource-0.2.3-4.el10_0.ppc64le.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-0.2.3-4.el10_0.aarch64.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debuginfo-0.2.3-4.el10_0.aarch64.rpm
yggdrasil-worker-package-manager-debugsource-0.2.3-4.el10_0.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-61726: A flaw was found in the net/url package in the Go standard library. The package does not enforce a limit on the number of unique query parameters it parses. A Go application using the net/http.Request.ParseForm method will try to process all parameters provided in the request. A specially crafted HTTP request containing a massive number of query parameters will cause the application to consume an excessive amount of memory, eventually causing the application to crash or become unresponsive, resulting in a denial of service.
